notes: Solid Galaga clone with working formation, diving, tractor beam capture, dual-ship rescue, and bonus stages, but enemy sprites are basic colored rectangles rather than recognizable Galaga art, and the capture beam mechanic has some rough edge cases.

A competent but simplified Galaga clone with working shooting, formations, dives, and capture mechanics, yet several logic/authenticity issues remain including nonstandard enemy layouts/bonus stage behavior and only approximate audiovisual fidelity.
